credentials: MSSW 1991 Univ of Texas at Arlington
name: Ellen SMITH

ratings.comment: Professor Smith was by far one of the best professors I had at UW.  She is truly passionate about her area of social work (child welfare) and puts in every effort to ignite that passion in her students.  She is also an amazing person if you get to know her.  I am so grateful that I had the opportunity to take her class!
